\tzpentry{ID3446}{Magnetic Flux Laplacian Operator}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3446 introduces Magnetic Flux Laplacian Operator as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$$\\nabla^2 \\Phi = 4\\pi G_{eff} \\rho, \\; \\rho = m_0 n.$$
